name: harness-kit
description: A portable engineering harness for Claude Code and Codex with reusable skills and verification hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable engineering discipline for Claude Code and Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds reusable engineering skills and a runtime-aware verification loop without duplicating project policy.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this repository and recommend the smallest useful harness.
Use Harness Kit to implement this change with evidence.
